browser_actions.expression: () => { const cPath = window.cPath || '/Homeplus'; const getValue = (selector) => document.querySelector(selector)?.value || ''; const getText = (selector) => (document.querySelector(selector)?.textContent || '').trim(); const getSelectedText = (selector) => document.querySelector(`${selector} option:checked`)?.textContent?.trim() || ''; const vendorArray = getValue('#VENDOR_CODE').split(',').filter(Boolean).map((item) => `'${item}'`); const sTab = window.main?.sTab || ''; return { url: `${cPath}/vdprpt7list/excelDown.do`, form: { HOUSE_CODE: '100', COMPANY_CODE: '100', GR_DATE1: getValue('#datepicker01').replaceAll('-', ''), GR_DATE2: getValue('#datepicker02').replaceAll('-', ''), VENDOR_CODE: vendorArray.join(','), DEPT_CODE1: getValue('#DEPT_CODE1'), DEPT_CODE2: getValue('#DEPT_CODE2'), STORE_TYPE: getValue('#STORE_TYPE'), STORE_TYPE_TEXT: getSelectedText('#STORE_TYPE'), SECTION_CODE1: getValue('#SECTION_CODE1'), SECTION_CODE2: getValue('#SECTION_CODE2'), BUYER_CODE: getValue('#BUYER_CODE'), BUYER_NM: getText('#BUYER_NM'), STORE_CODE: getText('#STORE_CODE'), PO_TYPE: getValue('#PO_TYPE'), PO_TYPE_TEXT: getSelectedText('#PO_TYPE'), CARRY_TYPE: getValue('#CARRY_TYPE'), CARRY_TYPE_TEXT: getSelectedText('#CARRY_TYPE'), HEADER_TABLE: `TE_VDPRPT_HEADER${sTab}`, DETAIL_TABLE: `TE_VDPRPT_DETAIL${sTab}` } }; }

browser_actions.message: 홈플러스는 일자별/배송처별 조회 화면에서 hidden form POST로 CSV를 다운로드한다.

notes: 로그인 후 미납관리 > 납품현황조회 > 일자별/배송처별 조회로 이동
